1.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ go out with the funeral of Thabit ibn al-Dahdahah riding a grey horse with white markings on its legs, with no saddle on it, and the people were around him. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ dismounted and performed the funeral prayer over him, then he sat until the burial was completed. Then he stood and mounted his horse and rode away, with the men walking around him.'
1.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ keluar bersama jenazah Tsabit ibn ad-Dahdahah menunggang kuda abu-abu dengan tanda putih di kakinya tanpa pelana, sementara orang-orang mengelilinginya. Rasulullah ﷺ turun dan menshalati jenazah itu, kemudian duduk hingga selesai. Lalu beliau berdiri, naik kuda, dan pergi dengan para lelaki berjalan di sekelilingnya.'

2.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'Whoever tells you that he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ delivering the khutbah while seated, do not believe him. I saw him more than a hundred times and he would deliver the khutbah standing, then sit, then stand again and deliver the second khutbah.' He was asked: 'How was his khutbah?' He said: 'It was moderate — words with which he admonished the people and recited verses from the Book of Allah, the Exalted.'
2.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Siapa yang memberitahumu bahwa ia melihat Rasulullah ﷺ berkhutbah sambil duduk, jangan percaya. Aku melihat beliau lebih dari seratus kali dan beliau berkhutbah sambil berdiri, lalu duduk, kemudian berdiri lagi untuk khutbah kedua.' Ditanya: 'Bagaimana khutbah beliau?' Ia berkata: 'Ringkas — kata-kata yang menasihati manusia dan membaca ayat-ayat dari Kitab Allah.'

3.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Prophet ﷺ say: A band of Muslims will conquer the white palace of Khosrow.'
3.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Sekelompok kaum Muslimin akan menaklukkan istana putih Kisra.'

4.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was never seen delivering the khutbah except while standing.'
4.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah terlihat berkhutbah kecuali sambil berdiri.'

5.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Prophet ﷺ, when he prayed Fajr, would sit in his place of prayer and not leave until the sun had risen.'
5.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ, ketika selesai shalat Subuh, duduk di tempat shalatnya dan tidak beranjak hingga matahari terbit.'

6.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to recite Quranic verses in his khutbah, admonish the people, and remind them of the days of Allah.
6.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa membaca ayat-ayat Al-Quran dalam khutbahnya, menasihati orang-orang, dan mengingatkan mereka tentang hari-hari Allah.

7.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The fingers of the Prophet ﷺ were spread wide.'
7.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Jari-jari Nabi ﷺ lebar dan menyebar.'

8.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Prophet ﷺ say: Islam will remain strong until there are twelve khaliphs.' Then he said something quietly that I could not hear. I asked my father: 'What did he say?' He replied: 'All of them will be from the Quraysh.'
8.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Islam akan tetap kuat hingga ada dua belas khalifah.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang pelan dan aku tidak mendengarnya. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku: Apa yang beliau katakan? Ia berkata: Semuanya dari kaum Quraisy.'

9.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Prophet ﷺ say: Before the Hour, there will be great liars.'
9.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: Menjelang Hari Kiamat akan muncul para pendusta besar.'

10.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'There were only a few white hairs on the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, in the parting of his hair. When he oiled his hair, the oil would cover them.'
10.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Hanya ada beberapa helai uban di kepala Rasulullah ﷺ, di bagian belah rambutnya. Ketika beliau mengoleskan minyak, minyak itu menutupinya.'

11.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Prophet ﷺ delivering the khutbah standing on the minbar, then sitting, then standing and delivering the khutbah standing. He said: 'Jabir said to me: Whoever tells you he used to deliver the khutbah sitting has lied. By Allah, I prayed with him more than two thousand prayers.'
11.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Nabi ﷺ berkhutbah sambil berdiri di atas mimbar, kemudian duduk, lalu berdiri kembali berkhutbah. Ia berkata: 'Jabir berkata kepadaku: Siapa yang memberitahumu bahwa beliau berkhutbah duduk, sungguh ia telah berdusta. Demi Allah, aku shalat bersamanya lebih dari dua ribu kali.'

12.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about praying in sheepfolds, and he permitted it. He was asked about praying in camel pens, and he forbade it. He was asked about performing ablution after eating camel meat, and he said: 'Perform ablution.' He was asked about ablution after eating mutton, and he said: 'If you wish, perform ablution; if you wish, do not.'
12.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang shalat di kandang kambing, dan beliau membolehkannya. Beliau ditanya tentang shalat di kandang unta, dan beliau melarangnya. Beliau ditanya tentang wudhu setelah makan daging unta, dan beliau bersabda: Berwudhulah. Beliau ditanya tentang wudhu setelah makan daging kambing, dan beliau bersabda: Jika kamu mau berwudhu, berwudhulah; jika tidak, tidak apa-apa.'

13.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man came to the Prophet ﷺ and asked: 'Do I need to perform ablution after eating mutton?' He said: 'No.' He asked: 'Can I pray in sheepfolds?' He said: 'Yes, if you wish.' He asked: 'Do I need to perform ablution after eating camel meat?' He said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'Can I pray in camel pens?' He said: 'No.'
13.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan bertanya: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah makan daging kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku shalat di kandang kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, jika kamu mau.' Ia bertanya: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah makan daging unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku shalat di kandang unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.'

14.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'Do I need to perform ablution after eating mutton?' He said: 'No.' He asked: 'Can I pray in sheepfolds?' He said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'Do I need to perform ablution after eating camel meat?' He said: 'Yes.' He asked: 'Can I pray in camel pens?' He said: 'No.'
14.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah makan daging kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku shalat di kandang kambing?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah makan daging unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku shalat di kandang unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.'

15.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered the mosque and saw the people sitting in circles. He said: 'Why do I see you scattered about?' Then he entered the mosque and saw them raise their hands during prayer. He said: 'They raise their hands as if they are tails of wild horses — be still during prayer.'
15.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memasuki masjid dan melihat orang-orang duduk berkelompok. Beliau bersabda: 'Mengapa aku melihat kalian berpencar-pencar?' Kemudian beliau masuk masjid dan melihat mereka mengangkat tangan saat shalat. Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka mengangkat tangan seolah ekor kuda liar — diamlah dalam shalat.'

16.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said — or: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say — Before the Hour, there will be liars. My father was closer to him than me and said: Beware of them.'
16.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda — atau: aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda — Menjelang Hari Kiamat akan ada para pendusta. Ayahku lebih dekat kepada beliau dari aku dan berkata: Berhati-hatilah terhadap mereka.'

17.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver the Friday khutbah standing, then sit, then stand again.'
17.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berkhutbah Jum'at sambil berdiri, kemudian duduk, lalu berdiri kembali.'

18.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that Simak asked him: 'What did the Prophet ﷺ do after praying Fajr?' He replied: 'He would sit in his place of prayer until the sun had risen.'
18.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Simak bertanya kepadanya: 'Apa yang Nabi ﷺ lakukan setelah shalat Subuh?' Ia menjawab: 'Beliau duduk di tempat shalatnya hingga matahari terbit.'

19.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah al-Suwa'i (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: This affair will continue to go on until twelve amirs have come. Then he said something quietly that I could not hear. I asked my father: What did he say? He said: All of them will be from the Quraysh.'
19.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah as-Suwa'i (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Urusan ini akan terus berlanjut hingga dua belas amir telah datang. Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang pelan yang tidak aku dengar. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku: Apa yang beliau katakan? Ia berkata: Semuanya dari kaum Quraisy.'

20.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in Zuhr and the night prayer: By the night when it covers, and in Asr something similar, and in Fajr longer than that.'
20.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat Zhuhur dan shalat malam: wal-layli idzaa yaghsyaa, dan dalam Ashar yang serupa, dan dalam Subuh lebih panjang dari itu.'

21.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to them one day and said: 'Why do I see you raising your hands as if they are tails of wild horses? Be still during prayer.' Then he came out to them and saw them in circles. He said: 'Why do I see you scattered about?' Then he came out to them and said: 'Should you not line up as the angels line up before their Lord?' They said: 'How do the angels line up before their Lord?' He said: 'They complete the first rows and stand close together in the row.'
21.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ keluar kepada mereka suatu hari dan bersabda: 'Mengapa aku melihat kalian mengangkat tangan seolah ekor kuda liar? Diamlah dalam shalat.' Kemudian beliau keluar dan melihat mereka berkelompok. Beliau bersabda: 'Mengapa aku melihat kalian berpencar?' Kemudian beliau keluar dan bersabda: 'Tidakkah kalian berbaris seperti para malaikat berbaris di hadapan Rabb mereka?' Mereka bertanya: 'Bagaimana para malaikat berbaris di hadapan Rabb mereka?' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka menyempurnakan shaf-shaf pertama dan rapat dalam shaf.'

22.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Let those people cease raising their eyes to the sky during prayer, or their eyes will not return to them.'
22.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Hendaklah orang-orang itu berhenti mengangkat pandangan mereka ke langit saat shalat, atau mata mereka tidak akan kembali kepada mereka.'

23.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was with his father — or his son — and mentioned the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'This affair will remain strong and protected, and its people will be granted victory over those who oppose them, until twelve khaliphs.' Then he said something that the crowd drowned out. I asked my father — or my son — : What was the word that the crowd drowned out? He said: 'All of them will be from the Quraysh.'
23.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bersama ayahnya — atau anaknya — dan menyebut Nabi ﷺ lalu berkata: 'Urusan ini akan tetap kuat dan terlindungi, dan pengikutnya akan dimenangkan atas orang-orang yang menentang mereka, hingga dua belas khalifah.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tenggelam oleh keramaian. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku — atau anakku: Apa kata-kata yang tenggelam itu? Ia berkata: Semuanya dari kaum Quraisy.'

24.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — or: the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said — Before the Hour, there are liars.' His brother said — and he was closer to the Prophet — : 'I heard him say: Beware of them.'
24.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ — atau: Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda — Menjelang Hari Kiamat ada para pendusta.' Saudaranya berkata — dan ia lebih dekat kepada Nabi: Aku mendengar beliau bersabda: Berhati-hatilah terhadap mereka.'

25.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when he prayed the morning prayer, would sit in his place of prayer until the sun had risen beautifully.'
25.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika selesai shalat Subuh, duduk di tempat shalatnya hingga matahari terbit dengan indah.'

26.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Indeed Allah, Blessed and Exalted, has named Madinah Tabah.'
26.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala telah menamai Madinah dengan Tabah.'

27.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'For a man to discipline his child is better for him than giving half a sa' in charity every day.'
27.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang pria mendidik anaknya lebih baik baginya daripada bersedekah setengah sha' setiap hari.'

28.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that Simak asked him about the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He replied: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in Fajr Surah Qaf and the Glorious Quran, and similar to it.'
28.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Simak bertanya kepadanya tentang shalat Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia menjawab: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat Subuh Surah Qaf wal-Quran al-Majid, dan yang semisalnya.'

29.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'We used to say behind the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he gave the salam: Peace be upon you, peace be upon you — while one of us would gesture with his hand to the right and left. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: What is the matter with those who throw their hands in prayer as if they are tails of wild horses? Is it not enough for one of you to place his hand on his thigh?'
29.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami biasa mengucapkan di belakang Rasulullah ﷺ ketika beliau salam: Assalamu'alaikum, assalamu'alaikum — sambil salah seorang dari kami mengisyaratkan dengan tangannya ke kanan dan kiri. Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Mengapa orang-orang itu melemparkan tangan mereka dalam shalat seolah ekor kuda liar? Tidakkah cukup bagi salah seorang dari kalian untuk meletakkan tangannya di atas pahanya?'

30.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ used to deliver the khutbah standing and sit between the two khutbahs, recite verses from the Quran, and his khutbah was moderate.
30.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa berkhutbah sambil berdiri dan duduk di antara dua khutbah, membaca ayat-ayat Al-Quran, dan khutbahnya ringkas.

31.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sabrah ibn Ma'bad (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ forbade praying in camel pens and permitted praying in sheepfolds.
31.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sabrah ibn Ma'bad (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melarang shalat di kandang unta dan membolehkan shalat di kandang kambing.

32.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded us to perform ablution from camel meat and not to perform ablution from mutton, to pray in the resting places of sheep, and not to pray in camel pens.'
32.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami untuk berwudhu setelah makan daging unta dan tidak berwudhu setelah makan daging kambing, shalat di tempat istirahat kambing, dan tidak shalat di kandang unta.'

33.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I entered upon the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in his house and found him reclining on a cushion.'
33.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku masuk menemui Rasulullah ﷺ di rumahnya dan mendapati beliau bersandar pada bantal.'

34.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ was brought a horse after he had turned away from the funeral of Abu al-Dahdah. He mounted it while we were walking around him.
34.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ dibawakan kuda setelah beliau selesai dari jenazah Abu ad-Dahdah. Beliau menaikinya sementara kami berjalan mengelilinginya.

35.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man killed himself and the Prophet ﷺ did not perform the funeral prayer over him.
35.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria membunuh dirinya sendiri dan Nabi ﷺ tidak menshalati jenazahnya.

36.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw it like a chicken egg, and its color was the color of his body.'
36.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihatnya seperti telur ayam, dan warnanya seperti warna tubuh beliau.'

37.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) — through his grandfather — that a man asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, should I perform ablution after eating mutton?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If you wish.' The rest of the hadith was mentioned.
37.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) — melalui kakeknya — bahwa seorang pria bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, apakah aku harus berwudhu setelah makan daging kambing?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika kamu mau.' Sisa hadits disebutkan.

38.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: I and the Hour are like these two — and he indicated with his fingers.'
38.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Aku dan Hari Kiamat seperti dua ini — dan beliau mengisyaratkan dengan jari-jarinya.'

39.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in Zuhr and Asr: By the sky containing great stars, and By the sky and the night visitor.
39.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat Zhuhur dan Ashar: was-samaai dzaatil-buruj, dan was-samaai wat-thariq.

40.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when Ma'iz ibn Malik was brought to him' — and he mentioned the hadith about the stoning.
40.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ ketika Ma'iz ibn Malik dibawa kepadanya' — dan ia menyebutkan hadits tentang hukuman rajam.

41.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'This religion will never cease to stand; a group of Muslims will fight for it until the Hour comes.'
41.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Agama ini tidak akan pernah berhenti tegak; sekelompok kaum Muslimin akan berperang untuknya hingga Hari Kiamat tiba.'

42.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a wide mouth, elongated eyes, and little flesh on his heels.' [Simak was asked: What is 'wide-mouthed'? He said: Large-mouthed. He was asked: What is 'elongated eyes'? He said: Long eye-lashes. He was asked: What is 'little flesh on heels'? He said: Little flesh on the heels.]
42.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memiliki mulut yang lebar, mata yang panjang bulu matanya, dan tumit yang sedikit dagingnya.' [Simak ditanya: Apa itu lebar mulut? Ia berkata: Mulut yang besar. Ditanya: Apa itu mata yang panjang? Ia berkata: Bulu mata yang panjang. Ditanya: Apa itu tumit yang sedikit dagingnya? Ia berkata: Tumit yang sedikit dagingnya.]

43.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Prophet of Allah ﷺ say: The treasures of Khosrow the White will certainly be conquered by a band of Muslims.'
43.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Nabi Allah ﷺ bersabda: Sungguh harta kekayaan Kisra yang Putih akan ditaklukkan oleh sekelompok kaum Muslimin.'

44.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'There were only a few white hairs on the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, in the parting of his hair. When he oiled them, the oil would cover them.'
44.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Hanya ada beberapa helai uban di kepala Rasulullah ﷺ, di bagian belah rambutnya. Ketika beliau mengoleskan minyak padanya, minyak itu menutupinya.'

45.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite in Fajr: Qaf and the Glorious Quran, and his prayer after that was lightened.'
45.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dalam shalat Subuh: Qaf wal-Quran al-Majid, dan shalat beliau setelah itu diringankan.'

46.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the Prophet ﷺ found the smell of garlic, he did not taste the food. The man came to him and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, I did not see the traces of your fingers in it.' He said: 'I found in it the smell of garlic.' The man said: 'Then you send me what you do not eat.' He said: 'For a messenger comes to me.'
46.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ketika mencium bau bawang putih, tidak menyentuh makanan. Pria itu datang kepadanya dan berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, aku tidak melihat bekas jari-jarimu di dalamnya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku mencium bau bawang putih di dalamnya.' Pria itu berkata: 'Lalu kamu mengirimkannya kepadaku padahal kamu tidak memakannya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Karena malaikat datang kepadaku.'

47.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked: 'Was there any grey hair in the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?' He replied: 'There was none in his head or beard except a few hairs in the parting of his head. When he oiled them, the oil would cover them.'
47.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya: 'Apakah ada uban di kepala Rasulullah ﷺ?' Ia menjawab: 'Tidak ada di kepala maupun jenggotnya kecuali beberapa helai di belahan kepalanya. Ketika beliau mengoleskan minyak padanya, minyak itu menutupinya.'

48.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man said to another: 'I lost my she-camel. If you find it, keep it.' He found it and it became sick. His wife said to him: 'Slaughter it.' He refused. It died. His wife said: 'We have slaughtered it so we may eat its meat and fat.' He said: 'Until I consult the Prophet ﷺ.' He came to him and informed him. He said to him: 'Do you have something to suffice you?' He said: 'No.' He said: 'Then eat it.' Its owner came later and said: 'Why did you not slaughter it?' He said: 'I was shy before you.'
48.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang pria berkata kepada orang lain: 'Aku kehilangan untaku. Jika kamu menemukannya, ambillah.' Ia menemukannya dan unta itu sakit. Istrinya berkata kepadanya: 'Sembelihlah.' Ia menolak. Unta itu mati. Istrinya berkata: 'Kita sudah menyembelihnya agar kita makan dagingnya dan lemaknya.' Ia berkata: 'Sampai aku bermusyawarah dengan Nabi ﷺ.' Ia datang kepada beliau dan memberitahu. Beliau berkata kepadanya: 'Apakah kamu memiliki sesuatu yang mencukupimu?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak.' Beliau bersabda: 'Makanlah.' Pemiliknya datang kemudian dan berkata: 'Mengapa kamu tidak menyembelihnya?' Ia berkata: 'Aku malu kepadamu.'

49.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ carried out the stoning punishment on a Jewish man and a Jewish woman.
49.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ melaksanakan hukuman rajam terhadap seorang pria Yahudi dan seorang wanita Yahudi.

50.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samurah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray the prayers in a manner similar to your prayers today, but they were shorter.'
50.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samurah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dengan cara yang mirip dengan cara kalian shalat hari ini, tetapi lebih singkat.'
